All Projects

A collection of my machine learning, NLP, and AI projects

Advanced RAG System Development

Implementing state-of-the-art Retrieval-Augmented Generation with agentic capabilities, advanced retrieval, and multi-agent architectures.

Learn more →

Intelligent Language Learning Platform

Real-time voice-based learning system integrating TTS, STT, and LLM services. Reduced response time by 65% with Redis caching. Scalable for 10K+ concurrent users. 95% user satisfaction.

Learn more →

LLM Fine-tuning for Domain Adaptation

Leveraging Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) techniques like LoRA and QLoRA to adapt foundation models for specialized domains like healthcare and legal.

Learn more →

ONNX Model Optimization Pipeline

Converting and optimizing ML models (especially sentence-transformers) to ONNX format for efficient cross-platform deployment and accelerated inference.

Learn more →

Cancer-Gene Relation Extraction Model

A fine-tuned biobert model for extracting complex relationships between cancer and genes, achieving up to 92% precision. Specialized to detect tumor suppressors, oncogenes, and driver genes in scientific literature.

Learn more →

Biomedical Information Retrieval System

Custom RAG architecture for medical literature achieving 85% relevancy. Specialized embeddings improved search accuracy by 40%. Processed 100K+ documents. Published research (arXiv:2407.12126).

Learn more →

Medical Translation AI

Advanced English-Turkish medical document translation system using MarianMT architecture and domain-specific fine-tuning.

Learn more →

Healthcare Clinical GloVe Embeddings

Domain-specific GloVe embeddings for healthcare NLP applications, offering 300-dimensional vectors that balance performance, interpretability, and efficiency for clinical text understanding and retrieval.

Learn more →

F5-TTS Turkish Model Development

Creating a high-quality Turkish Text-to-Speech system using the F5-TTS architecture, web-scraped data, and language-specific fine-tuning.

Learn more →

Medical Dictation System

High-accuracy speech recognition for clinical settings using fine-tuned Whisper models with medical domain adaptation.

Learn more →

Cancer Genetics Relation Extraction

NLP system using BioBERT for Named Entity Recognition (NER) and Relation Extraction (RE) to identify cancer-gene relationships in medical texts.

Learn more →

Turkish Scientific Language Models

Released transformer models on HuggingFace achieving 3-10% performance improvement. Specialized embeddings used by 1000+ researchers. Efficient training pipeline reduced resource usage by 50%.

Learn more →

About Me

Architecting and deploying enterprise-scale AI solutions, specializing in LLMs, RAG, MLOps, NLP, and real-time AI systems. specializing in LLMs, RAG, MLOps, and real-time AI systems.
